purpose: Fail-closed gate that attributes high-core stalls to concrete metadata surfaces (validation pipeline stages, allocator shard/magazine paths, runtime evidence emission, pthread/stdio synchronization) rather than broad perf prose. The gate is checked-in: it validates the *contract* that any future contention-attribution report must satisfy, without requiring a live benchmark. A future benchmark wave (bd-juvqm.1 baseline + bd-juvqm.3 RCU/BRAVO prototype) will produce reports that this gate rejects when required stage rows or tail-quantile fields are missing.

validation_pipeline_stages.rationale: Per-thread cache front-stage; misses fall through to bloom/arena and are observable in p99/p999 tails.
Bloom-filter probe; false-positive rate determines arena lookup pressure.
Authoritative arena lookup; lock contention here directly attributes to high-core stalls.
Pointer fingerprint check; cycles attributed here are pure compute, not synchronization.
Boundary canary check; failures here are tampering signals, not perf signals — but the *cost* of the check is part of the membrane overhead budget.
Final bounds check before granting access; gates the strict <20ns / hardened <200ns membrane budget.
Shard selection picks a per-CPU magazine; shard contention is the dominant tail driver above 32 threads.
Magazine refill/drain crosses to the global allocator; observed as p999 spikes on multi_64 profile.
Decision-card / structured-log emission; bounded cost is essential — this stage attributes stalls caused by ring backpressure (covered separately by bd-juvqm.7).
Mutex + condvar wakeup latency; tropical-latency / CVaR tails come from this stage on multi_64+.
FILE-stream lock; flock_helpers contention shows up here. Distinct from pthread_sync because the lock geometry differs (per-FILE vs global).

downstream_consumers.consumes: RCU/BRAVO prototype reads contention_hint per stage to decide which lock to replace; proceeds only on stages that fail closed in this gate today.
Evidence ring backpressure stress reuses the evidence_emission stage's expected_signal; loss-count rows that fail this gate fail-close on the bead-7 stress run too.

regeneration_note: When a validation pipeline stage is added, removed, renamed, or migrates to a different owner_subsystem, regenerate this manifest atomically with source_commit. Stages SHOULD NOT be silently dropped — deprecate via a `deprecated_at_commit` field if a stage is permanently retired so peers running off older checkouts can still resolve their attribution.
